badges.cta: Sign in to track your progress and see which badges you've already earned.

EARLY_ADOPTER.label: Early Adopter
EARLY_ADOPTER.description: One of the first members of LightHouse
EARLY_ADOPTER.howToEarn: This badge was awarded to users who signed up during the closed beta period.

FIRST_COMMENT.label: First Comment
FIRST_COMMENT.howToEarn: Jump into the conversation — post your first comment on any video.

WATCH_STREAK.label: Watch Streak
WATCH_STREAK.howToEarn: Stay consistent — watch at least one video every day for 7 consecutive days.

SUPER_FAN.label: Super Fan
SUPER_FAN.description: A dedicated fan of a creator
SUPER_FAN.howToEarn: Show your appreciation — like 50+ videos across LightHouse.

PREMIUM_MEMBER.label: Premium Member
PREMIUM_MEMBER.howToEarn: Unlock premium content by subscribing to any paid plan on LightHouse.

CHESS_WIN.label: Chess Victor
CHESS_WIN.description: Won a game of chess against the bot
CHESS_WIN.howToEarn: Beat the AI opponent in Chess — any difficulty counts.

CHESS_ONLINE_WIN.label: Online Champion
CHESS_ONLINE_WIN.howToEarn: Win a real-time 1v1 online chess match against another player.

MINESWEEPER_WIN.label: Bomb Defuser
MINESWEEPER_WIN.howToEarn: Clear any minesweeper board without hitting a mine.

MINESWEEPER_EXPERT.label: Mine Expert
MINESWEEPER_EXPERT.description: Cleared the hard minesweeper board (30×16, 99 mines)
MINESWEEPER_EXPERT.howToEarn: Clear the Hard difficulty board (30×16, 99 mines).

MINESWEEPER_ONLINE_WIN.label: Online Sweeper
MINESWEEPER_ONLINE_WIN.howToEarn: Win a 1v1 online minesweeper match against another player.

contact.title: We'd love to hear from you
